description: Start LambdaTest iOS cloud session. Supports both app-specific and full device-wide testing.
when_to_use: User asks to start cloud iOS session on LambdaTest
User asks to run iOS test on LambdaTest device
User explicitly asks for cloud execution
User wants to test the whole iOS device on cloud
User wants to test without a specific uploaded app
prerequisites: A valid LambdaTest app id is required ONLY for app-specific testing, not for device-wide testing

app_testing.description: Test a specific app uploaded to LambdaTest.

device_wide_testing.description: Test the whole device without launching the primary uploaded app. Entry point is Settings (com.apple.Preferences); use press_home_button to reach the home screen.

slot_prompts.app: Provide LambdaTest app ID (lt://...) for app testing. Skip for device-wide testing.
slot_prompts.cloud_bundle_id: For device-wide testing, bundle id of the system app to open (e.g. com.apple.Preferences for Settings).

examples.query: Start lambdatest ios session for my app
Start lambdatest ios session to test the whole device
Start lambdatest ios session on iPhone 14 with iOS 16
